title: Costera lucida
taxonomy: Costera lucida is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to Mexico, and more specifically, the state of Veracruz. As a member of the Melastomataceae family, it is closely related to other tropical plants in Central and South America. Within the family, Costera lucida is placed in the tribe Miconieae. The classification of this species is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic analysis.
